PROJECT.NAME: kaClaLepa18
PROJECT.TITLE: Clavelina lepadiformis, genome assembly, alternate haplotype.
PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project provides the genome assembly of Clavelina lepadiformis. The assembly is provided by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) via the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/).

PROJECT.NAME: kaClaLepa18-mito
PROJECT.TITLE: Clavelina lepadiformis, mitochondrial assembly, kaClaLepa18-mito.
PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project provides the mitochondrial assembly of Clavelina lepadiformis. The assembly is provided by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) via the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/).
